# Studio Rabot

Studio Rabot is an interior architecture and renovation studio based in Gent (Ghent), Belgium. It was founded by Rogier Christiaens, an interior architect with a focus on timeless architecture, historical buildings, and authentic materials with a weathered, patinated character.

## Who is Rogier Christiaens

Rogier Christiaens is the founder and lead interior architect of Studio Rabot. He guides every project from the first conversation through concept, permit applications, and execution, with a personal, dialogue-driven approach to design.

## Services

- Interieurprojecten (interior projects): custom-made interiors, kitchens, bathrooms, dressing rooms, fireplaces, offices, practice spaces, and shop interiors.
- Architectuurprojecten (architecture projects): renovations, extensions, and structural changes, carried out together with specialized partners, including permit guidance.
- Renovatie en restauratie van hoeves en historische gebouwen (renovation and restoration of farmhouses and historical buildings): respecting existing heritage while reinforcing it with contemporary interventions.
- Nieuwbouw in landelijke en tijdloze stijl (new-build projects in a rural, timeless style): modern farmhouses, pastoriewoningen, and countryside new builds inspired by historically correct proportions.

## Location

Studio Rabot is located at Rietstraat 102, 9000 Gent, Belgium, and serves Gent and the surrounding region (Gent en omgeving).
